name: Almond-Orange Biscotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour a cookie sheet.
3. In a large bowl, sift together the flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
4. Make a well in the center of the mixture; add the eggs, oil, almond extract, orange zest, and chopped almonds, then mix well.
5. Divide the dough into two equal parts.
6. Shape each half into flat-bottomed cylinders, measuring 1-inch high by 2 1/2-inches wide by 8-inches long.
7. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until golden brown on top. Remove from oven and let cool slightly.
8. Cut the biscuits into 3/4-inch slices. Place cut side down onto a baking sheet.
9. Return to the oven for an additional 15 minutes, or until the slices are lightly browned.
10. Remove from the oven and allow to cool on racks before serving.
